column1: # Particles (助詞) — grammatical markers that attach to words/clauses.
# Belongs here: case particles (は, が, を, に, で, へ), focus/adverbial particles
# (も, しか, こそ, さえ, でも, ばかり, ほど, くらい, など), and common compound
# particles (には, では, として, にとって, によって). Sentence-final particles
# (か, ね, よ, な) live here too. Multi-mora bound patterns go in sentence-patterns.

column4: at; by; with (location of action, means)
until; up to; as far as
etc.; and so on; things like
for; to; from the standpoint of
